params.name: Portland Vase
params.description: On Dec 4, 1845, a drunk man broke the glass cover of the Portland Vase by mistake. The Portland Vase is painted in deep blue color and white enamel, like the sea with rolling waves. There are also 7 life-like Roman gods engraved on it, such as the Cupid. How to restore this double-glazed vase? First, the blue bottle is blown into shape before it's immersed into the white glass liquid. Then the two are blown into one. After the bottle is formed, carvings will be made on the outer impermeable glas …
